_meta.description: Required structure for Fraymakers manifest.json per-character package.
_meta.note: The manifest.json lives at the root of the character content package (next to library/).

description.description: Short description shown in mod menu

icon.description: Relative path to icon image (PNG, 512×512 recommended)

dependencies.description: Array of content id strings this mod depends on

tags.description: Array of tag strings for filtering

homepage.description: URL to mod page or source

entityPath.description: Path to Character.entity file relative to manifest

includes: resourceId, content array with character + characterAi entries
full ui metadata: entityId, render (with icon_no_palette + door offsets), hud (all variants), css
remaining_todos: no icon/thumbnail sprite generated — user must create hud/css/icon animations manually in FrayTools
game field is hardcoded 'Super Smash Flash 2' — fine for SSF2 ports
projectile entries not auto-added — added per-character when projectiles are detected
